metadata.title: About Me
metadata.description: About Yuji Min - Frontend Developer specializing in React, Next.js, and TypeScript

about.heading: About Me
about.bio1: I'm Yuji Min, a software developer currently focusing on frontend development at work.
about.bio2: Through this blog, I hope to share my experiences and connect with others who love building things that make a difference.

metadata.title: Spec
metadata.description: How yujimin.dev was built - tech stack, tools, and design decisions

spec.heading: Spec
spec.intro: Welcome to yujimin.dev. Step into a retro virtual desktop where my work lives in draggable windows - a playful mix of classic interface and modern tech.

windows.title: Draggable Windows
windows.description: Drag, resize, minimize, and maximize - just like a real desktop.
